data.title: Google Gemini may add AI video generation function
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Google App v16.6.23 code shows that Gemini may soon support video generation (videogen) function, but the function has not yet been officially launched and the release time is uncertain. "Videogen" and "robin" (Gemini's internal code) appear together in the code, and include prompts such as "We will notify you when it is ready", suggesting that Gemini may have AI video generation capabilities. Currently, Google has launched Google Vids, which supports script writing, editing, voice generation, background removal and other functions, but it is not a pure generative AI video system. (Jinshi)

data.title: WisdomTree launches crypto ETP product WCRP and lists it on multiple European exchanges
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News WisdomTree announced the launch of the crypto ETP product WisdomTree Physical CoinDesk 20 ETP (WCRP), which is currently listed on Börse Xetra, Swiss Stock Exchange and Euronext Paris and Amsterdam. WisdomTree Physical CoinDesk 20 ETP was developed in cooperation with CoinDesk Indices and aims to provide investment channels for about 20 highly liquid crypto assets.

data.title: Binance.US website shows that it has resumed supporting US dollar trading services for US customers
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the Binance.US website shows that it has resumed supporting US dollar trading services for US customers. Users can use US dollars to safely purchase Bitcoin, Ethereum, and more than 160 cryptocurrencies. It will be gradually opened to all eligible users in the next few days. The restored US dollar-related functions include:
• USD deposits and withdrawals: Users can deposit or withdraw US dollars through bank accounts (ACH) with zero handling fees.
• Use USD to buy and sell cryptocurrencies: Support bank transfers (ACH) to directly purchase cryptocurrencies.
• USD and cryptocurrency swaps: Instant conversion of USD and cryptocurrency.
• Restore 10 USD trading pairs: including BTC/USD, XLM/USD, DOGE/USD, SOL/USD, ETH/USD, ADA/USD, HBAR/USD, SHIB/USD, SUI/USD, BNB/USD, and more trading pairs will be added in the future.
• Fixed investment function: Support automatic purchase of cryptocurrencies daily, weekly, biweekly or monthly.

data.title: Kaito AI: KAITO token now supports Base blockchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Kaito AI published an article on the X platform saying that KAITO tokens now support the Base blockchain.

data.title: BNB Chain’s Meme Liquidity Program’s first-day winner is BROCCOLI (F3b)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Chain announced that the winning project of Meme Liquidity Program Day 1 is BROCCOLI (F3b). After reviewing all data and verifying the winner's benchmark, the first $200,000 in liquidity funds will support BROCCOLI (F3b).

data.title: Is Elon Musk running DOGE into chaos? Trump and Democrats lawyer up
data.description:
Democrats are not happy with Musk and DOGE’s access to federal data. To that end, they have filed a lawsuit calling the billionaire an “agent of chaos” in the federal government. They say the billionaire has been given virtually unchecked authority without proper legal authorization and supervision of his authority. The Trump administration has said […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/musk-running-doge-into-chaos-trump-lawyer-up/

data.title: CZ's donation address now has 747 BNB. Currently, most of them are scientists or individuals who use tools to participate in batches.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to ai_9684xtpa, CZ said that when you try to make quick money, you often lose money; when you donate money to others, you get more in return - so there is a new angle of "donating 0.0004 BNB to get Meme": 
1. A 0.0004 BNB (0.26 US dollars); 
2. Over 1 million transactions. 
The donation address now has 747 BNB, excluding the previous part of at least 500 $BNB participation, over 330,000 US dollars. It should be noted that most of the current donations are made by scientists or individuals in batches with the help of tools.

data.title: Edison Chen leads 3 CORNERZ to rock the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival, presented by Gate.io
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival, exclusively sponsored by Gate.io, made its debut in Hong Kong. As the largest official special event of the Consensus Conference, the festival invited Edison Chen to lead the Cantonese hip-hop group 3 CORNERZ to perform, bringing a highly tense music stage to the audience and attracting many industry leaders of Web3 to participate.
Edison Chen, known as the "No. 1 Player in Web3", led the 3 CORNERZ group to present a highly recognizable Cantonese hip-hop aesthetic that night, integrating a variety of musical elements to make the live performance extremely experimental and fascinating, instantly igniting the enthusiasm of thousands of audiences in the venue, becoming one of the most talked-about performances of the festival.
In 2025, the Consensus Conference landed in Hong Kong for the first time, and this time Gate.io also realized the debut of the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival. Since its establishment in 2013, Gate.io has rapidly developed into one of the world's earliest and most well-known cryptocurrency exchanges, with more than 21 million users and a market share that ranks TOP4 in the industry. In 2025, Gate.io officially became the exclusive cryptocurrency exchange partner of the F1 Red Bull Racing Team, further expanding the global influence of blockchain.
Disclaimer
This event is for entertainment and social purposes only. The content of this article does not constitute an offer, solicitation or recommendation of any product or service. Gate.io does not promote or provide any products or services in Hong Kong and other restricted areas. Please note that Gate.io may restrict or prohibit the use of all or part of its services in restricted areas.

data.title: Vitalik: The blockchain community and the entire world are currently in a relatively dangerous state
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Vitalik Buterin said: "I think the blockchain community, and the entire world, is in a relatively dangerous state. There are many things happening that have no long-term value, or even malicious, and these sentiments and the people behind them get a lot of attention. But we can't just shout against these things and not ask for a better alternative. So our goal should be to make this alternative well and demonstrate that a stable and brighter future is possible. Here I am talking about both the blockchain circle (if Memecoin, which fell 97% in one day, is not our future, then what is?) and a macro-social aspect, but at Devcon a political scientist told me that one of the reasons he respects Ethereum very much is that we are a truly open and decentralized ecosystem, and we have succeeded at this scale so far, which gives him hope. So if we can succeed in this way, the positive impact on the world may be huge, and it will give many people examples of success that they can follow."
